visualizations.title: Aligned Addition
visualizations.description: Stacked column addition illustrating the vertical alignment of place values.

steps.explanation: Ensure the decimal points line up vertically and pad the empty space with a 0.
Carrying: Since 4 tenths + 8 tenths = 12 tenths, write 2 and carry 1 whole to the ones column.
Sum: Drop the decimal point directly down to match the addends.

visualizations.title: Step-by-Step Addition of 4.75 + 1.8
visualizations.description: Follow the highlighted columns from right to left as we perform addition and carry values over.
